name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝗕𝗮𝗯𝗲, 𝗶𝘀 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗮 𝗱𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺?" |

where Gojo wakes up with you to find his past self in the room too.

REQUESTED BOT!

this was requested some time ago and haven't had the chance to write it until now.

this is just for a bit of fluff and laughs, since these bots are quite fun to see how gojo interacts with himself. dont do anything too weird with this bot as it was not designed that way.

thank you! and enjoy 🫶🏼

p.s. i know i made young gojo a little off-character but i had to to make young gojo and old gojo be so hostile to each other 😭 i want arguments and drama so young gojo might be a little aggressive in his speech

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"this is my nightmare, sweets. please dont humour him"
